description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a dark, hipped roof and a combination of wood and concrete exterior finishes. The upper level is clad in dark wood paneling, while the lower level is finished in light gray concrete, creating a striking contrast. Large windows line both floors, allowing for ample natural light and providing views from multiple rooms. The front entry is accessed by a central staircase leading up to a spacious concrete terrace, flanked by landscaped evergreen trees. The rear of the house features additional large windows and a secondary entryway, maintaining the modern aesthetic. The overall structure is elevated, with the lower level partially below the terrace, suggesting a split-level or hillside design.
description: A modern, two-story house with a dark hipped roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, and a central staircase leading to a raised terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, raised terrace, large windows, and several evergreen trees in the landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the terrace, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows, a secondary entry, and the full expanse of the wood-paneled upper level.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, additional windows, and the distribution of trees on the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a raised terrace, glass door entry, no porch or columns, minimalistic modern design
